title: Nuxt Scripts Upgrade Boosts Functionality and Fixes

topics.title: Dependency Updates
topics.summary: Merged PR #2591 updates the @nuxt/scripts dependency from v0.13.2 to v1.0.1, addressing various bug fixes and improvements. This update enhances functionality, including better handling of proxying self-hosted domains and resolving conflicts in Google Maps integration. Manual merge is required as automerge is disabled.

topics.title: Community Sponsorship
topics.summary: A heartfelt thank you to @antfu.me for sponsoring the development of Vue Data UI and ./npmx. This sponsorship enables the redistribution of funds to @willow.sh, recognizing her significant contributions to open-source software. Such community support fosters collaboration and innovation in the developer ecosystem.
